name: Down East Blueberry Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the sugar and margarine until smooth.
2. Add the eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Gradually add the flour mixture (baking powder and salt).
4. Stir in half of the warm milk.
5. Fold in the blueberries that have been mixed with 2 tablespoons of flour.
6. Pour the batter into a greased and floured 9-inch pan.
7. Sprinkle the remaining sugar and cinnamon over the top.
8. Bake at 350°F for 35 minutes.
